_comment: KQL Real-Time Dashboard — Supply Chain Real-Time
Import this definition into a Fabric Real-Time Dashboard.
Queries reference the Shipments, InventorySnapshot, and
RealtimeSales tables in tt_kqldb.  The Shipments table
is populated from the supply chain data generator and synced
to Eventhouse via Lakehouse shortcut or Data Pipeline.
name: Supply Chain Real-Time

tiles.title: Shipments In Transit
tiles.kql_query:
Shipments
| where ShipmentDate <= now() and DeliveryDate > now()
| summarize
    InTransitCount = count(),
    TotalUnits = sum(Quantity),
    TotalValue = round(sum(Quantity * CostPerUnit), 2)
| project InTransitCount, TotalUnits, TotalValue

tiles.title: Delivery ETA Distribution
tiles.kql_query:
Shipments
| where ShipmentDate <= now() and DeliveryDate > now()
| extend DaysUntilDelivery = round(toreal(DeliveryDate - now()) / 1d, 1)
| extend ETABucket = case(
    DaysUntilDelivery <= 1,  "0-1 days",
    DaysUntilDelivery <= 3,  "1-3 days",
    DaysUntilDelivery <= 7,  "3-7 days",
    DaysUntilDelivery <= 14, "7-14 days",
    "14+ days"
  )
| summarize ShipmentCount = count() by ETABucket
| order by case(
    ETABucket == "0-1 days",  1,
    ETABucket == "1-3 days",  2,
    ETABucket == "3-7 days",  3,
    ETABucket == "7-14 days", 4,
    5
  ) asc

tiles.title: Warehouse Receiving Rate
tiles.kql_query:
let lookback = 24h;
Shipments
| where DeliveryDate > ago(lookback) and DeliveryDate <= now()
| summarize
    ShipmentsReceived = count(),
    UnitsReceived = sum(Quantity)
    by WarehouseId, bin(DeliveryDate, 1h)
| order by DeliveryDate asc, WarehouseId asc

tiles.title: Supplier Lead Time Trend
tiles.kql_query:
let lookback = 30d;
let top_suppliers =
    Shipments
    | where ShipmentDate > ago(lookback)
    | summarize ShipmentCount = count() by SupplierId
    | top 5 by ShipmentCount desc
    | project SupplierId;
Shipments
| where ShipmentDate > ago(lookback)
| join kind=inner top_suppliers on SupplierId
| extend LeadTimeDays = round(toreal(DeliveryDate - ShipmentDate) / 1d, 1)
| summarize
    AvgLeadTime = round(avg(LeadTimeDays), 1),
    P95LeadTime = round(percentile(LeadTimeDays, 95), 1)
    by SupplierId, bin(ShipmentDate, 1d)
| order by ShipmentDate asc, SupplierId asc

tiles.title: Cross-Dock Efficiency
tiles.kql_query:
let lookback = 7d;
Shipments
| where DeliveryDate > ago(lookback) and DeliveryDate <= now()
| extend LeadTimeDays = round(toreal(DeliveryDate - ShipmentDate) / 1d, 1)
| extend TransportCategory = case(
    TransportMode == "truck",  "Ground",
    TransportMode == "rail",   "Rail",
    TransportMode == "air",    "Air",
    TransportMode == "sea",    "Ocean",
    "Other"
  )
| summarize
    ShipmentCount = count(),
    AvgLeadTime = round(avg(LeadTimeDays), 1),
    TotalUnits = sum(Quantity),
    AvgCostPerUnit = round(avg(CostPerUnit), 2)
    by TransportCategory
| extend Efficiency = round(toreal(TotalUnits) / toreal(ShipmentCount), 1)
| order by Efficiency desc

tiles.title: Late Shipment Alerts
tiles.kql_query:
let expected_lead_time_buffer = 2d;
Shipments
| where ShipmentDate <= now() and DeliveryDate > now()
| extend
    ExpectedLeadTime = toreal(DeliveryDate - ShipmentDate) / 1d,
    ElapsedDays = round(toreal(now() - ShipmentDate) / 1d, 1)
| extend OriginalETA = ShipmentDate + totimespan(strcat(tostring(toint(ExpectedLeadTime)), "d"))
| extend IsLate = ElapsedDays > (ExpectedLeadTime + toreal(expected_lead_time_buffer / 1d))
| where IsLate == true or (toreal(DeliveryDate - now()) / 1d) < 1.0
| extend Urgency = case(
    IsLate == true, "overdue",
    toreal(DeliveryDate - now()) / 1d < 0.5, "critical",
    "at_risk"
  )
| project
    SupplierId,
    WarehouseId,
    ProductId,
    Quantity,
    ShipmentDate,
    DeliveryDate,
    ElapsedDays,
    Urgency
| order by case(
    Urgency == "overdue",  1,
    Urgency == "critical", 2,
    Urgency == "at_risk",  3,
    4
  ) asc, ElapsedDays desc
| take 50
